info.title: Fleet REST API
info.description: REST API for Fleet device management platform. Paths and schemas are generated from live API responses; see README.

BearerAuth.description: API token authentication. Get your token from My Account > Get API token in the Fleet UI.

parameters.name: activity_type
parameters.description: Indicates the activity type to filter by. See available activity types in the [Audit logs docs](https://github.com/fleetdm/fleet/blob/main/docs/Contributing/reference/audit-logs.md).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: end_created_at
parameters.description: Filters to include only activities that happened before this date. If not specified, set to now.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Can be any column in the activities table.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page. Maximum is 10,000 records. If no pagination parameters are specified, defaults to 10,000.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query keywords. Searchable fields include actor_full_name and actor_email.

parameters.name: start_created_at
parameters.description: Filters to include only activities that happened after this date. If not specified, set to the earliest possible date.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: command_status
parameters.description: Comma-separated string of one of the following options: 'ran', 'pending', or 'failed'.

parameters.name: host_identifier
parameters.description: Required. The host's hostname, uuid, or hardware_serial. Returns only commands that target the specified host. Omitting host_identifier is deprecated (see the deprecation notice below). Requests w/o it continue to work for backward compatibility but are not recommended; the underlying query is not performant at scale and may time out on large fleets. Support will be removed in Fleet 5.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Can be any field listed in the results array example below. Default is updated_at.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page. Default is 10.

parameters.name: request_type
parameters.description: The request type to filter commands by.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Allowed fields are name, id, and updated_at.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Can be any column in the fleets table.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query keywords. Searchable fields include name.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The desired fleet's ID. Use 0 for "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. Defines what fleet ID to operate on

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: automation_type
parameters.description: Filters by automation type. Supported values are "software", "scripts", "calendar", "conditional_access", and "other".

parameters.name: merge_inherited
parameters.description: If true, will return both fleet policies and inherited ("All fleets") policies in the policies list, and will not return a separate inherited_policies list.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Allowed fields are id, name, team_id, created_at, updated_at, failing_host_count, and passing_host_count.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query keywords. Searchable fields include name.

parameters.name: fleet_id
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. The ID of the fleet whose host counts should be included. Defaults to all fleets.

parameters.name: low_disk_space
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Returns the count of hosts with less GB of disk space available than this value. Must be a number between 1-100.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Platform to filter by when counting. Defaults to all platforms.

parameters.name: additional_info_filters
parameters.description: A comma-delimited list of fields to include in each host's additional object. This query is populated by the additional_queries in the features section of the configuration YAML.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used. Note: Use page instead of after

parameters.name: bootstrap_package
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters the hosts by the status of the MDM bootstrap package on the host. Valid options are 'installed', 'pending', or 'failed'.

parameters.name: connected_to_fleet
parameters.description: Filter hosts that are talking to this Fleet server for MDM features. In rare cases, hosts can be enrolled to one Fleet server but talk to a different Fleet server for MDM features. In this case, the value would be false. Always false for Linux hosts.

parameters.name: dep_assign_profile_response
parameters.description: Filters the hosts by DEP profile assignment status. Valid options are 'SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'THROTTLED' or 'NOT_ACCESSIBLE'. Only Apple hosts which are, or were assigned to Fleet in ABM will be returned.

parameters.name: dep_profile_error
parameters.description: If true, the response will only include Apple MDM hosts with DEP profile assignment errors(mdm.dep_profile_error: true).

parameters.name: device_mapping
parameters.description: Indicates whether device_mapping should be included for each host.

parameters.name: disable_failing_policies
parameters.description: If true, hosts will return failing policies as 0 regardless of whether there are any that failed for the host. This is meant to be used when increased performance is needed in exchange for the extra information.

parameters.name: fleet_id
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters to only include hosts in the specified fleet. Use 0 to filter by "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: include_device_status
parameters.description: If true, the response will include lock and wipe status (mdm.device_status) and mdm.pending_action information for each host.

parameters.name: low_disk_space
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters the hosts to only include hosts with less GB of disk space available than this value. Must be a number between 1-100.

parameters.name: macos_settings
parameters.description: Filters the hosts by the status of the _mobile device management_ (MDM) profiles applied to hosts. Valid options are 'verified', 'verifying', 'pending', or 'failed'. Note: If this filter is used in Fleet Premium without a fleet ID filter, the results include only "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: macos_settings_disk_encryption
parameters.description: Filters the hosts by disk encryption status. Valid options are 'verified', 'verifying', 'action_required', 'enforcing', 'failed', or 'removing_enforcement'.

parameters.name: mdm_enrollment_status
parameters.description: The _mobile device management_ (MDM) enrollment status to filter hosts by. Valid options are 'manual', 'automatic', 'enrolled', 'pending', or 'unenrolled'. 'pending' only includes Apple (macOS, iOS, iPadOS) hosts in Apple Business (AB) that are not yet enrolled to Fleet.

parameters.name: mdm_id
parameters.description: The ID of the _mobile device management_ (MDM) solution to filter hosts by (that is, filter hosts that use a specific MDM provider and URL).

parameters.name: mdm_name
parameters.description: The name of the _mobile device management_ (MDM) solution to filter hosts by (that is, filter hosts that use a specific MDM provider).

parameters.name: munki_issue_id
parameters.description: The ID of the _munki issue_ (a Munki-reported error or warning message) to filter hosts by (that is, filter hosts that are affected by that corresponding error or warning message).

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Can be any column in the hosts table.

parameters.name: os_name
parameters.description: The name of the operating system to filter hosts by. os_version must also be specified with os_name. See note below for filtering Windows hosts.

parameters.name: os_settings
parameters.description: Filters the hosts by the status of the operating system settings applied to the hosts. Valid options are 'verified', 'verifying', 'pending', or 'failed'. Note: If this filter is used in Fleet Premium without a fleet ID filter, the results include only "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: os_settings_disk_encryption
parameters.description: Filters the hosts by disk encryption status. Valid options are 'verified', 'verifying', 'action_required', 'enforcing', 'failed', or 'removing_enforcement'. Note: If this filter is used in Fleet Premium without a fleet ID filter, the results include only "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: os_version
parameters.description: The version of the operating system to filter hosts by. os_name must also be specified with os_version. See note below for filtering Windows hosts.

parameters.name: os_version_id
parameters.description: The ID of the operating system version to filter hosts by.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: The ID of the policy to filter hosts by.

parameters.name: policy_response
parameters.description: Requires policy_id. Valid options are 'passing' or 'failing'.

parameters.name: populate_labels
parameters.description: If true, the response will include labels for each host.

parameters.name: populate_policies
parameters.description: If true, the response will include policy data for each host, including Fleet-maintained policies.

parameters.name: populate_software
parameters.description: If false (or omitted), omits installed software details for each host. If "without_vulnerability_details", include a list of installed software for each host, including which CVEs apply to the installed software versions. true adds vulnerability description, CVSS score, and other details when using Fleet Premium. See notes below on performance.

parameters.name: populate_users
parameters.description: If true, the response will include user data for each host.

parameters.name: profile_status
parameters.description: Requires profile_uuid. Valid options are 'verified', 'verifying', 'pending', or 'failed'.

parameters.name: profile_uuid
parameters.description: Requires profile_status. The UUID of the profile to download.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query keywords. Searchable fields include hostname, hardware_serial, uuid, ipv4, and end user email addresses.

parameters.name: software_status
parameters.description: The status of the software install to filter hosts by. One of: pending_install, failed_install, installed, pending_uninstall, failed_uninstall, pending, or failed. Mutually exclusive with software_version_id, and must be supplied if software_title_id is set.

parameters.name: software_title_id
parameters.description: The ID of the software title to filter hosts by.

parameters.name: software_version_id
parameters.description: The ID of the software version to filter hosts by.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Indicates the status of the hosts to return. Can either be 'new', 'online', 'offline', 'mia' or 'missing'.

parameters.name: vulnerability
parameters.description: The cve to filter hosts by (including "cve-" prefix, case-insensitive).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The host's id.

parameters.name: exclude_fleet_maintained_policies
parameters.description: If true, will omit Fleet-maintained policies from the policies list.

parameters.name: exclude_software
parameters.description: If true, the response will not include a list of installed software for the host.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The host's ID.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Allowed fields are id, created_at, and activity_type.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page. Maximum is 10,000 records. If no pagination parameters are specified, defaults to 10,000.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The host's id.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The host's id.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Options include common_name and not_valid_after. Default is common_name

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required The id of the host to get the disk encryption key for.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The host's id.

get.summary: Get host's mobile device management (MDM) and Munki information

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required The id of the host to get the details for

get.summary: Get host's mobile device management (MDM) information

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required The id of the host to get the details for

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The host's ID.

parameters.name: exclude_no_results
parameters.description: If true, exclude reports that don't save results. Default is false.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Valid options are "name" and "last_fetched". Default is "name".

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query keywords. Searchable fields include name.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The ID of the desired host.

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: Required. The ID of the desired report.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The host's id.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Can be ordered by name or executed_at.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The host's ID.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: available_for_install
parameters.description: If true or 1, only list software that is available for install (added by the user). Default is false.

parameters.name: exploit
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. If true, filters to only include software with vulnerabilities that have been actively exploited in the wild (cisa_known_exploit: true). Default is false.

parameters.name: macos_applications
parameters.description: If true, filters to only include software at the top level of the /Applications folder. This parameter applies only to macOS hosts, and is ignored for hosts on other platforms. Default is false.

parameters.name: max_cvss_score
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters to only include software with vulnerabilities that have a CVSS version 3.x base score lower than what's specified.

parameters.name: min_cvss_score
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters to include only software with vulnerabilities that have a CVSS version 3.x base score higher than the specified value.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Options include "name". Default is "name".

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query keywords. Searchable fields include name.

parameters.name: self_service
parameters.description: If true or 1, only lists self-service software. Default is false.

parameters.name: vulnerable
parameters.description: If true or 1, only list software that have vulnerabilities. Default is false.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: bootstrap_package
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters the hosts by the status of the MDM bootstrap package on the host. Valid options are 'installed', 'pending', or 'failed'. Note: If this filter is used in Fleet Premium without a fleet ID filter, the results include only "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: fleet_id
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters the hosts to only include hosts in the specified fleet.

parameters.name: label_id
parameters.description: A valid label ID. Can only be used in combination with order_key, order_direction, after, status, query and fleet_id.

parameters.name: low_disk_space
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters the hosts to only include hosts with less GB of disk space available than this value. Must be a number between 1-100.

parameters.name: macos_settings
parameters.description: Filters the hosts by the status of the _mobile device management_ (MDM) profiles applied to hosts. Valid options are 'verified', 'verifying', 'pending', or 'failed'. Note: If this filter is used in Fleet Premium without a fleet ID filter, the results include only "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: macos_settings_disk_encryption
parameters.description: Filters the hosts by disk encryption status. Valid options are 'verified', 'verifying', 'action_required', 'enforcing', 'failed', or 'removing_enforcement'.

parameters.name: mdm_enrollment_status
parameters.description: The _mobile device management_ (MDM) enrollment status to filter hosts by. Valid options are 'manual', 'automatic', 'enrolled', 'pending', or 'unenrolled'. 'pending' only includes Apple (macOS, iOS, iPadOS) hosts in Apple Business (AB) that are not yet enrolled to Fleet.

parameters.name: mdm_id
parameters.description: The ID of the _mobile device management_ (MDM) solution to filter hosts by (that is, filter hosts that use a specific MDM provider and URL).

parameters.name: mdm_name
parameters.description: The name of the _mobile device management_ (MDM) solution to filter hosts by (that is, filter hosts that use a specific MDM provider).

parameters.name: munki_issue_id
parameters.description: The ID of the _munki issue_ (a Munki-reported error or warning message) to filter hosts by (that is, filter hosts that are affected by that corresponding error or warning message).

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.description: What to order results by. Can be any column in the hosts table.

parameters.description: The name of the operating system to filter hosts by. os_version must also be specified with os_name

parameters.name: fleet_id

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter by platform ("windows" or "darwin")

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: fleet_id
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium._ Filters to labels belonging to the specified fleet, plus global labels. Specify "global" to show only globally-available labels. If omitted, Fleet returns all global labels, plus all labels for fleets to which the requestor has access.

parameters.name: include_host_counts
parameters.description: Whether or not to calculate host counts for each label. Default is true. See "additional notes" for more information.

parameters.name: order_direction

Note: If this filter is used in Fleet Premium without a fleet ID filter, the results include only "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: mdm_enrollment_status

parameters.name: mdm_id

parameters.name: status

get.summary: Get hosts' aggregate mobile device management (MDM) and Munki information

parameters.name: fleet_id
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters the aggregate host information to only include hosts in the specified fleet.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: command_status
parameters.description: Comma-separated string of one of the following options: 'ran', 'pending', or 'failed'.

parameters.name: host_identifier
parameters.description: Required. The host's hostname, uuid, or hardware_serial. Returns only commands that target the specified host. Omitting host_identifier is deprecated (see the deprecation notice below). Requests w/o it continue to work for backward compatibility but are not recommended; the underlying query is not performant at scale and may time out on large fleets. Support will be removed in Fleet 5.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Can be any field listed in the results array example below. Default is updated_at.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page. Default is 10.

parameters.name: request_type
parameters.description: The request type to filter commands by.

parameters.name: include_ui_settings
parameters.description: If set to true, includes the columns the user hides on the Hosts page (default: false).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: fleet_id
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters response data to the specified fleet. Use 0 to filter by "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: max_vulnerabilities
parameters.description: Limits the number of vulnerabilities returned per OS version. (If omitted, returns all vulnerabilities.)

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Allowed fields are: hosts_count. Default is hosts_count (descending).

parameters.name: os_name
parameters.description: The name of the operating system to filter hosts by. os_version must also be specified with os_name

parameters.name: os_version
parameters.description: The version of the operating system to filter hosts by. os_name must also be specified with os_version

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page. Default is 20.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filters the hosts to the specified platform. One of: "darwin" (macOS), "windows", "linux", "chrome", "ios", "ipados", or "android".

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query keywords. Searchable fields include name.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: fleet_id
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. The ID of the fleet for the reports to be listed. When omitted, returns global reports.

parameters.name: merge_inherited
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. If true, will include global reports in addition to fleet-level reports when filtering by fleet_id. (If no fleet_id is provided, this parameter is ignored.)

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Can be any column in the reports table.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Return reports that are scheduled to run on this platform. One of: "macos", "windows", "linux" (case-insensitive). (Since reports cannot be scheduled to run on "chrome" hosts, it's not a valid value here)

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query keywords. Searchable fields include name.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The id of the desired report.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The ID of the desired query.

parameters.name: fleet_id
parameters.description: Filter the query report to only include hosts that are associated with the fleet specified

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: fleet_id
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. The ID of the fleet to filter scripts by. If not specified, it will filter only scripts that are available for "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Can be ordered by id, name, created_at, or updated_at.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The desired script's ID.

parameters.name: alt
parameters.description: If specified and set to "media", downloads the script's contents.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The value to get results after. This needs order_key defined, as that's the column that would be used.

parameters.name: available_for_install
parameters.description: If true or 1, only list software that is available for install (added by the user). Default is false.

parameters.name: exclude_fleet_maintained_apps
parameters.description: If true or 1, Fleet maintained apps will not be included in the list of software_titles. Default is false

parameters.name: exploit
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. If true, filters to only include software with vulnerabilities that have been actively exploited in the wild (cisa_known_exploit: true). Default is false.

parameters.name: fleet_id
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters the software to only include the software installed on the hosts that are assigned to the specified fleet. Use 0 to filter by "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: hash_sha256
parameters.description: Filters to only include custom software packages (uploaded installers) with the specified SHA-256 hash. fleet_id must be specified to filter by hash. This allows checking if a specific package already exists before uploading.

parameters.name: max_cvss_score
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters to only include software with vulnerabilities that have a CVSS version 3.x base score lower than what's specified.

parameters.name: min_cvss_score
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters to include only software with vulnerabilities that have a CVSS version 3.x base score higher than the specified value.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.name: order_key
parameters.description: What to order results by. Allowed fields are name and hosts_count. Default is hosts_count (descending).

parameters.name: package_name
parameters.description: Filters to only include custom software packages (uploaded installers) with the specified package filename. fleet_id must be specified to filter by package name. This allows checking if a specific package already exists before uploading.

parameters.name: packages_only
parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. If true or 1, only lists packages available for install (without app store apps).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filters software titles available for install by platforms. fleet_id must be specified to filter by platform. Options are: "macos" (alias of "darwin"), "darwin" "windows", "linux", "chrome", "ios", "ipados". To show titles from multiple platforms, separate the platforms with commas (e.g. ?platform=darwin,windows).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query keywords. Searchable fields include title and cve.

parameters.name: self_service
parameters.description: If true or 1, only lists self-service software. Default is false.

parameters.name: vulnerable
parameters.description: If true or 1, only list software that has detected vulnerabilities. Default is false.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Required. The software title's ID.

parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. If true, filters to only include software with vulnerabilities that have been actively exploited in the wild (cisa_known_exploit: true). Default is false.

parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters to only include software with vulnerabilities that have a CVSS version 3.x base score lower than what's specified.

parameters.name: min_cvss_score

parameters.description: Requires order_key. The direction of the order given the order key. Options include "asc" and "desc". Default is "asc".

parameters.description: What to order results by. Allowed fields are name, hosts_count, cve_published, cvss_score, epss_probability and cisa_known_exploit. Default is hosts_count (descending).

parameters.name: without_vulnerability_details

parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters only include vulnerabilities affecting the specified fleet. Use 0 to filter by "Unassigned" hosts.

parameters.name: order_key

parameters.description: Results per page.

parameters.name: cve
parameters.description: The cve to get information about (format must be CVE-YYYY-<4 or more digits>, case-insensitive).

parameters.description: _Available in Fleet Premium_. Filters response data to the specified fleet. Use 0 to filter by "Unassigned" hosts.
